Forever & always, this very moment
My dearest wifey,
There are not enough words in all the languages of the world to describe what you mean to me. You are the warmth I wake up to, the thought that makes me smile in the middle of nowhere, the place that feels like home no matter where we are.

You are my everything — my laughter, my calm, my adventure, my peace. Every single day with you feels like the universe quietly saying "see, I told you she was worth it."

So here I am, telling you again, with my whole heart —
I love you forever,
my wifeeyyy 💕
